title: Weberocereus biolleyi
taxonomy: Weberocereus biolleyi is a species of cactus in the family Cactaceae. It is part of the subfamily Opuntioideae and the tribe Pachycereeae. Weberocereus biolleyi is native to Costa Rica and is considered to be an epiphytic species. This species of cactus is also known as the 'Epiphytic Weberocereus' due to its unique habit of growing on other plants. Weberocereus biolleyi is a rare and endemic species, adding to its unique classification and characteristics.

This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its health benefits, which include anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antimicrobial properties, helping to alleviate symptoms of various ailments such as fever, pain, and infections.
